programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A professional dog groomer reaches out to Cesar for help with three of her toughest clients; Cesar helps a couple with their head-strong pit bull.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Puppy mills produce millions of dogs; Caesar works with an animal rights group to rescue and rehabilitate some pups.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar Millan helps Suzie Dove Miles, who has recently adopted a Doberman who is fearful of literally everything.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Family dogs brawl with each other; a dog torments a child; a five-legged miniature pinscher has an aggressive attitude.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar attempts to introduce Roscoe, an agoraphobic Akita who is too scared to leave the house and garden and has never been for a walk, to the outside world.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Weimaraner eats everything in sight; a yellow Lab's excess energy is expressed destructively; an Australian shepherd is unable to socialize with other dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Three canines with issues at a dog-friendly ad agency office; a border collie mix becomes excited and unresponsive to commands when in her owner's truck.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Velvet Revolver drummer Matt Sorum's French bulldog goes crazy at the sight of other dogs; Cesar helps a former therapy dog with aggression issues.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A woman who has relinquished the role of pack leader to her Welsh Sealyham terrier; an English mastiff with too much energy; a Tibetan terrier who is a terror on walks.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A Pekingese who refuses to eat or drink; a Chihuahua who bites people; two chow mixes who share a home but won't play nice with each other.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A woman's French bulldog exhibits people aggression that started for no apparent reason when he turned two years old.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Life coach and fitness trainer Jillian Michaels can whip contestants on the "Biggest Loser" television series into shape, but she's at a loss when it comes to her dog; escape artist dog; dog dislikes brooms and windshield wipers.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog takes the day off to try his hand at coaching, and assigns Tim and Leland to track down a dangerous fugitive on their own. Can the boys prove they can handle it?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The boys get distracted by the bikini-clad lovelies on Waikiki when they hunt for Lucy, a homeless, alcoholic fugitive. Beth is amused by the boys, but this is serious business: Tim will have to pay the bond if Lucy isn't caught.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog faces a tough personal and professional situation when he must hunt down his friend, Ili, who has helped him on many busts. But now Ili's on the other side of the law, and now Dog must bring her in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is out to make two grabs on two islands in one day. Part of the team is goes to Kona to nab a woman who skipped her court date. Meanwhile, Dog and the others hunt Patrick, a fugitive who's fighting in an Extreme Boxing event on the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has only a few days to catch a woman nicknamed Cats or forfeit Beth's $10,000 bond. But it won't be easy - Cats is eight months pregnant, so Dog will have to lure her in rather than risk a violent grab.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in for a big surprise after he catches a fugitive named Jonaven in a sting operation.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team really have their hands full when they go after a tough guy named Nunu, who leads them on a chase through apartment complexes and a shopping mall before he's finally captured.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's feeling lucky, so he's going to try to capture two women in one day. The first, Moani, has "crazy" tattooed on her neck and is facing drug charges. The second fugitive, Jade, who turns out to be a tough catch, despite help from Jade's sister.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has problems when he goes to a small town on the Big Island of Hawaii to track down a fugitive. In a small town, everyone knows everyone else's business, making it impossible for Dog to hunt in secret.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team search for Jonah, a violent and desperate criminal facing?20 years in jail. The trail goes stale when Dog runs into evasive family members and an angry girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team go after Kandice, AKA Candy, AKA Suga, a stripper who didn't make her court appearance. They convince one of her friends to lure her to a supermarket parking lot, where Dog has an easy time fetching the fetching young thing. But then

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth take on the heartbreaking case of Rachel. Rachel's mom bailed her out of jail on condition that she go to AA meetings and stick to a curfew. But Rachel hasn't kept up her end of the bargain, and now her mother wants her back to jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is trying to cut down on smoking, but it's not easy with his high-stress job. Today, he must track down Walter, a fugitive who believes that the Canadian military has planted a chip in his teeth that allows him to communicate with his van.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth designs a luxurious new office for the team and shows it off to Dog, but the bounty hunter is more interested in starting his hunt for Federico, who's been revoked for missing court dates and generally running amuck.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes on his a case, which involves Bobby, who's been on parole for three months pending sentencing on an assault charge. Bobby's girlfriend wants him back in jail, and Dog agrees that the Bobby needs to be behind bars.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog pursues two people whose lives have been ruined by drugs. First, he tracks Mae, who traded a good home and loving family for an ice pipe. The next case involves Jude. His addiction has caused his pregnant wife to fear for her safety.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is a rough, tough bounty hunter, but he's a softie at heart, as the two cases in this episode show.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog answers two very different calls for help from women. In the first case, he helps Leland protect Maria, who's being threatened by her violent husband. Then Dog visit a young woman who's dying and has asked to see Dog as one of her final wishes.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Baby Lyssa, who's just turned 18 and is studying to become a bondsman, gets to do some on-the-job training when she helps Dog hunt for Wayne, who's run out on a bond for second-degree assault.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is sick as a dog, but he still must lead the hunt for a fugitive named James. James' girlfriend tries to cover for him, but Dog surprises James in his bedroom and leads him away in cuffs.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Beth buys Dog a shirt with an embroidered chicken, but Dog explains he only wears shirts with pictures of either Jesus or a Harley-Davidson. When it's time to go to work, the team goes after Necia, a fugitive with felony charges pending.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's Christmas day, and Dog sets out to nab Raymond, who robs to support his ice habit, and give him a little Christmas gift - shiny new handcuffs.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth must go after their former housekeeper, Lisa, who's jumped bond. They know this case will be tricky because Lisa knows everyone in the family. Luckily, Beth's nephew, Jason, is visiting and is quickly put to work as the bait.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Before Tim heads out for a tough day of bounty hunting, he likes to get in a little quality time with his daughter, Summer Rain.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After giving a rousing speech to an audience of enthusiastic grade-schoolers, Dog catches up with an old friend, Sheriff Tommy Cayetano, to talk business. Dog's got a tough fugitive, named Mia, to catch and Tommy is happy to lend a hand.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows very little about Peter, but what he does know, he doesn't like! Not only is he currently facing two counts of second degree sexual assault, about week ago, he dropped out of sight before missing his court date.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: It's the day before Valentine's Day and love is in the air at Da Kine Bail Bonds--but not for Tapi who has failed to appear in court on theft charges. Dog's plan is to have Leland knock on Tapi's door with a Valentine's gift to draw her out.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis attempts to bribe Kirby to prevent her from marrying Adam; Claudia receives another package from her late husband; Fallon remains unable to walk, until her child's life is in danger.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle learns she is pregnant; Fallon suffers from painful headaches; Claudia and Steven visit Matthew's accident site in Peru; once home, however, Claudia receives a phone call from her late husband.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis makes a plan to upset Blake's business deal with Rashid Ahmed; Tracy attempts to seduce Blake and is fired; Steven grows suspicious of Dex, who places a mysterious phone call to Claudia.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Dex finds Alexis with Rashid and turns to Tracy for comfort; learning the reasons behind her father's death, Kirby buys a gun; the mysterious caller turns out to be a tape-recorded message; Alexis moves ahead with her plan to ruin Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Kirby learns the truth behind her father's suicide; Krystle tells a stunned Alexis of her pregnancy; Fallon and Jeff announce they will remarry. Blake is planning to attack a nation involved in the China Seas Deal.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake travels to Hong Kong to patch up the China Seas oil deal and learns that Ahmed has left the country; Mark blackmails Alexis for $100,000, and McVane watches as he deposits the check; Kirby attempts to kill Alexis but is unsuccessful.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis thwarts Blake's loan extension; Sammy Jo arrives in Denver to see her son; after quarreling with Alexis, Mark is found dead after a fall from her balcony.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake mortgages the mansion to raise money; Tracy tells Alexis of her affair with Dex; Alexis is questioned about Mark's death; Sammy Jo intends to obtain custody of her son; an unknown woman, full of curiosity about Alexis, checks into La Mirage.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Kirby's attempt to kill Alexis is unsuccessful, and Alexis promises to remain silent if Kirby will leave Adam; Sammy Jo reveals the culprit behind Claudia's mystery calls; Fallon is gripped with a seizure and drives off as her wedding is about to begin.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Following a serious traffic accident, Fallon mysteriously vanishes. Dex and Steven bail Alexis out of jail. Sammy Jo attempts to seduce Adam. Alexis flatters Adam by suggesting he work with her defense attorney, Warren Ballard.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Steven accuses Adam of conspiring with Sammy Jo to kidnap Danny. Blake arranges to take out a mortgage on the mansion. He little suspects Alexis has signed the note and will become the owner if he defaults.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: To secure financing for his bankrupt company, Blake arranges to see Billy Waite, a notoriously underhanded oil man. Jeff continues his search for Fallon. Impatient with the progress her lawyer is making on her defense, Alexis fires Warren Ballard.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: In Seattle, Jeff and Blake learn the woman who died in the plane crash with Peter DeVilbis cannot be positively identified, but the ring she was wearing is indeed Fallon's wedding band. Back in Denver, Fallon's moving funeral is held.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake visits Dominique at La Mirage to discuss her recent revelation. She tells Blake that her mother was a long-time mistress of his father and has evidence to prove it. At Alexis' trial, a neighbor offers powerful evidence that incriminates Alexis.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex plays Cupid to help his shy pal Skippy get together with Jane, the girl of his dreams, but his good intentions go awry when the girl falls for him instead.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Steven gets depressed from interviewing frightfully inept candidates as housekeeper-nanny for the baby, such as a child-hater ad an ex-con.

programme.title: Family Ties
programme.desc: Alex's chances for acceptance into a smug college fraternity are dependent upon him having a knockout date for the pledge dance.

programme.title: Family Ties

programme.desc: Alex falls asleep while working on a college term paper on Thomas Jefferson and dreams that his family and friends are living 200 years ago.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Colleen and Brian run away to keep their father from taking them away from Dr. Mike and Sully. After they are found, it's discovered Colleen has developed pneumonia. Dr. Mike realizes she has to let them go to save them.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: The town puts on a production of Romeo and Juliet. Brian tries to learn what love is so he can write a paper for school.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike convinces Robert E to take a job fixing a train boiler, then finds out it is a dangerous job.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: A teenage Belle Star robs the saloon with the Younger brothers and is shot. Dr. Mike takes her home in an effort to show her a real home life, attempting to turn her from her life of crime.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: An abrasive Dr. John Porter arrives in town after hearing of the discovery of dinosaur bones.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: When Dr. Mike becomes the substitute school teacher, the town gets upset when she teaches the children about evolution.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike and Sully convince Chief Black Kettle that he should move his starving people to a new reservation. Dr. Mike and Sully are both working on wedding presents for each other.

programme.title: Dr. Quinn, Medicine Woman
programme.desc: Dr. Mike and Sully have second thoughts about their love for one another as they recall their tumultuous relationship.

programme.title: Nine Venoms
programme.desc: After selling his soul to the devil, Joey is given the power to control 9 demons. With their help, Joey must save his childhood friend Gary from a bloody massacre.

programme.title: Enter The Panther
programme.desc: A young kung fu master seeks vengeance upon the villains.

programme.title: Master of Death
programme.desc: After training for 18 years with a shaolin monk, Chow sets off to take revenge on the men that killed his family.

programme.title: Last Fist of Fury
programme.desc: Dae-dong has recently been appointed as the leader of the Ching Wu Martial Arts gym. He faces a challenge from the Japanese and ultimately meets his demise.

programme.title: Fists and Guts
programme.desc: Gordon Liu stars in this Kung Fu comedy as an undercover Shaolin Monk. While searching for a fugitive who has wronged the order, the Master (Liu) uncovers a scheme to steal the priceless Jade Buddha.

programme.title: Invincible Armour
programme.desc: John Liu and Hwang Jang Lee star together in this awesome kung fu film. The storyline involves a man who is framed for murder and must fight to clear his name while authorities pursue him. Great fighting styles and high kick action!

programme.title: Iron Monkey (1977)
programme.desc: Iron Monkey is the nickname of a young man who becomes the sole survivor of a Manchurian massacre. After burying his family, a fate-filled road leads Iron Monkey to the Shaolin Temple, where he masters with agility the fearsome Monkey Fist method.

programme.title: Rage Of The Master
programme.desc: A kung fu school's master is killed by a disgruntled former student. Now a casino owner and the master's children seek out the help of Tiger Wong to get revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1992, Laura Houghteling disappeared from her Bethesda home and was never seen again. Forensic scientists use evidence from her bedroom to direct police to a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, 9-year-old Valiree Jackson vanished on her way to school near Spokane. Her father, Brad Jackson, reported the disappearance and the entire community started searching for her abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It was the single most deadly automobile accident in American history. Almost a hundred vehicles were involved, twelve people died and more than fifty people were injured. And it happened along a stretch of highway long known for dense, thick fog.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The wife of a respected police officer was murdered in her own home. The crime went unsolved for more than a decade, until a newly formed cold case unit took a fresh look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a college student is reported missing, police believe their investigation will be like countless others. But when they discover blood spatter in her boyfriend's bedroom, they know this case is going to be different.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When two boys are brutally attacked, investigators rely on evidence fished out of a nearby pond. It became the first case where diatom analysis was used to place a suspect at the scene of the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Genell Plude is found dead in her bathroom, the scene points to suicide. But a coroner's inquest and a unique application of forensic science give investigators a different explanation for her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Police discover a bullet-riddled car, a missing driver and no witnesses. Had the victim been abducted or was she dead? The answers are found in a unique clue, so tiny it was measured in millionths of a meter.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In rural Canada, Dr. John Schneeberger is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting one of his female patients and his step daughter. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the patient insists that he sedated and raped her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2007, the Florida mobile home of Effie and Michael Ratley catches fire. Michael heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is found beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in a ravine, and crucial evidence has been washed away by severe thunderstorms. Twice, the trail turns cold. Almost 20 years later, an old hat and a chip of stainless steel brings the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a policeman's house goes up in flames, experts suspect arson. The officer whose home was torched arrests low-level drug dealer James Wren, who confesses. But when the suspect vanishes, investigators question the authenticity of the confession.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1992, 22-year-old Dawn Bruce is brutally murdered in her Virginia apartment. Investigators notice a blood smear on a pillow case that appears to have been made by one of the killer's fingers.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, Patrick McRae was found dead in his Des Moines home and the crime scene was awash with blood. Analysis showed it had come from two people, one of whom was female.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police discovered the body of Douglas Beamish's estranged wife, authorities linked 20 cat hairs found on her jacket to a cat owned by Beamish's parents. It was the first time animal DNA was used to solve a criminal case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When Leann Fletcher is found dead, investigators use blood spatter analysis and forensic computing to find a motive for her murder: her husband, a prominent lawyer, was having an affair with judge Susan Chrzanowski.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the series premiere of "Forensic Files", the longest-running true crime series in history, a Connecticut flight attendant goes missing. Police suspect her husband is guilty of murder, but can they prove it?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A teenager went missing after an evening of horseback riding. Her body was found a month later, three miles from her home. But the killer unknowingly left trace evidence behind.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young couple decided to celebrate their first wedding anniversary with a camping trip to Mount Hood. During the trip, the husband was shot and killed. Later, his wife told two different versions of the events which led to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A suspect's former lover comes forward with a fantastic tale of murder, mutilation and cremation. But there's no way to test the story's validity — until a plant pathologist and a dendrochronologist conduct tests where the cremation supposedly occurred.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: It's usually easy to determine how a criminal entered the crime scene. But in this case, it looked as if the killer vanished into thin air — and perhaps he had.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When heart surgeon Darryl Sutorius is found dead in the basement of his upscale Cincinnati home, police assume he committed suicide. Further investigation reveals that his new wife Della has a history of violence and an insatiable desire for money.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2005, the body of young mother Summer Baldwin was found in a suitcase in a Texas landfill.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Paul Gruber's daughter suspected something was wrong when she received birthday cards addressed from her father, but written in a stranger's handwriting.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: On the night of May 22, 1992, Betty Wilson returned home after a meeting and discovered her husband lying in a pool of blood. Jack Wilson had obviously been murdered — but how?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the 1990s, the media dubbed Richard Rogers the "Last Call Killer" because he targeted men in gay bars who were obviously intoxicated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1981, New York correctional officer Donna Payant disappeared and was later found in a landfill. The medical examiner not only identified the cause of death, but also found an important clue.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Rita's father, Master Vile, arrives to do what she and Zedd have failed to do; destroy the Rangers.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Master Vile and his evil crew appear to be winning the battle against the Power Rangers.

programme.desc: Master Vile uses Dischordia to try to control the Pink and Yellow Rangers with her voice.

programme.title: Mighty Morphin Power Rangers
programme.desc: Master Vile turns back time to gain control of Earth and turn the Rangers into helpless children.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Ghost of Carnegie
programme.desc: TAPS is called out to the Carnegie Library of Homestead, in Pennsylvania to investigate a site that once held violent riots between legendary capitalist, Mr. Carnegie and the steel workers. It is believed that Mr.Carnegie still haunts the library.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Harvesting Murder
programme.desc: A sugar plantation worker tied his daughter to a bed and went to work. Unable to escape, she died in a fire. Claims from the staff of Hawaii's Plantation Village in Waipahu.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Well of Horror
programme.desc: TAPS is joined by Jason's daughter, Haily, on two cases; The Shanley Hotel in Napanoch, New York and Old Fort Niagara, in Youngstown, New York. Both cases involve a gruesome death that took place at a well, instigating paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Roasts and Ghosts

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Stage Fright
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, the team heads to Rapids Theater in Niagara Falls, New York where a lonely actress hanged herself backstage. The staff believes her spirit has never left and is haunting the theater.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Murdered Matron
programme.desc: Special guest investigator Meredith Vieira joins the TAPS team, as they investigate Sailors' Snug Harbor in Staten Island, New York. Once a retirement home to weathered seaman, it's now home to the spirit of a murdered matron.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: The Bloodiest 47 Acres
programme.desc: TAPS is called out to Jefferson City, Missouri, to investigate the notorious Missouri State Penitentiary. A prison that was once named one of the most violent prisons in America.Riots, stabbings and executions left thousands dead over the years.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Voices of Pain
programme.desc: On this episode TAPS heads back to the fan favorite; Waverly Hills Sanatorium in Louisville, Kentucky, an abandoned tuberculosis hospital haunted by its former patients and staff.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Distillery of Spirits
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Buffalo Trace Distillery in Frankfort, Kentucky to investigate hauntings at the oldest operating distillery in America.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Membership Denied
programme.desc: TAPS is called out to Hartford, CT to Elks Lodge, the oldest and largest secret fraternal organizations in the country. Elks Lodge #19 is shrouded in mystery and tragedy with a gruesome death hanging over its head....and decades of paranormal activity.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Christmas Spirit
programme.desc: TAPS gets into the spirit with an investigation of Bethlehem, Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Roller Ghoster
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters,TAPS heads to Ohio to investigate Kings Island, anamusement park that sits on land that was thesite of an awful accident.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Buyer Beware
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Naples, New York, to investigate the Naples Hotel.This hotel was built in 1895.

programme.title: Ghost Hunters: Flooded Souls
programme.desc: On this episode of Ghost Hunters, TAPS heads to Hales Bar Dam and Marina in Tennessee, to investigate a dam that was built on Native American land.

programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú busca ayudar a Don Sebas con su problema de peso, mientras que Peluzín y el Noruego buscan aprovecharse de un afamado cantante del edificio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Mientras que el Abuelo está vuelto loco por encontrar su revista favorita, Peluzín desentierra la verdad sobre su verdadera familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín trata de averiguar el paradero de su madre con la ayuda de sus dos nuevos papás, mientras que Gaspar invita al Abuelo, el Noruego y Johnny a el nuevo restaurante de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y Peluzín buscan lucran aprovechando el próximo paro de agua en la ciudad, mientras que el Noruego nos revela por fin después de tanto tiempo el porque de su miedo al baño.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: As real estate outside Manhattan continues to explode, KJ returns to her hometown of Rye, N.Y., for a coveted listing and secures the help of her interior designer mom to bring in potential buyers.

programme.desc: Steve becomes an unwilling host to a meltdown between Ryan and Fredrik; Tyler hosts a Roaring '20s-themed private showing; At one of Fredrik's private showings, KJ opens up about her future career plans.

programme.desc: Ryan hustles to land his first new development under SERHANT; Fredrik celebrates his decision to go bi-coastal and announces new plans; Steve hits the ice to lock down his 57th Street rental, and Tyler celebrates an emotional closing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Olympic gold medalist Suzie McConnell comes to give Mister Rogers a basketball lesson. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, everyone is welcomed to be part of a team and given team uniforms.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits the San Diego Wild Animal Park where guide Joan Embery shows him giraffes, elephants, tigers and other animals living there.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a film processing plant to learn how people turn an unexposed roll of film into finished photographs.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: The Neighborhood of Make-Believe presents "Josephine the Short-Neck Giraffe," a musical story for children by Mister Rogers!

programme.desc: The special 3-part musical story for children continues as Josephine and Hazel Elephant enroll at the School for Growing, where they meet a snake who can't hiss, an elephant with stripes, and a very shy giraffe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: "Josephine the Short-Neck Giraffe" concludes today as shy J. R. Giraffe helps Josephine learn to accept herself just the way she is.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers helps out at Negri's Nusic Shop when Helena leaves to care for her sick son. Queen Sara learns that an employee of "Food for the World" is sick and her help is needed.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers and Mr. McFeely show how they make an apple-peanut butter treat and remind children how much they learn from people other than their parents.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers meets Natasha, a famous oboeist. She shows pictures of her children and says she expresses her feelings for them through her music. Prince Tuesday is considering getting sick so that his parents will stay home from work.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Marilyn Barnett invites Mister Rogers outside for some exercises. Bruce Franco carries a collection of balloon scuptures he has made for the party. He gives Mister Rogers a balloon sculpture that looks like the Neighborhood Trolley.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers introduces a week of programs about the environment. He shows how things can be reused. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, there's a real-life problem -- too much garbage -- and the neighbors are trying to find a solution.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a bandage on his left hand. He pulls back the bandage to show that his hand is still there. Ana scraped her paw but does not want a bandage. Lady Aberlin is able to convince her otherwise.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood

programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of wolves "singing," and wolf expert Kent Weber stops by with two wolves and explains that wolves are shy, not big and bad like in the fairy tales, and how they live together in families.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Folksinger Ella Jenkins visits Mister Rogers with her ukulele and shares songs her father enjoyed.

programme.desc: Mister Rogers brushes his teeth in his bathroom talks about how important it is to take care of our teeth, and even visits a dentist's office!

programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film of an earthmover digging a hole. Mr. McFeely shows a toothpaste video. Lady Aberlin wears a tiger suit, so she can be related to Daniel. Daniel declares that they are related by their hearts.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami, Chopper, and Brooke keep trying to evade Jora and win back the Sunny even though it's been turned into a piece of art! In the Colosseum, Don Chin Jao finally faces Luffy - whose power will prove greater?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy stands along against Don Chinjao, and learns about the old grudge he bears against Garp! Meanwhile, Usopp and Robin get swept up in the Tontatta Kingdom's raid against the royal family, and Franky learns the eerie secret of Dressrosa.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tontatta Kingdom gears up for its all-out assault on the Doflamingo Family, as Usopp and Robin are caught up in the war effort! Meanwhile, Franky arrives the headquarters of the toy movement where he finds Zoro, Nami & the others are cornered by Jora.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Don Chin Jao's hatred of Garp and Luffy is finally explained, while his battle against Luffy comes to an end. With tremendous power, one of them is squarely eliminated! But is that really the end of the Colosseum battle?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With the battle with Don Chinjao long behind him, Luffy advances to the final round! Block-D contender Cavendish, however, takes the chance and pounces on Luffy, who is defended by an unlikely ally! The agenda of Colosseum gladiator Rebecca is exposed.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Rebecca's deep bonds with the one-legged toy soldier are revealed! Her lineage can be traced to the previous ruler of Dressrosa - and her eternal bond with the damaged toy is linked to the violent overthrow of that regime by none other than Doflamingo!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As Rebecca enters the ring for the battle for Block D, the crowd shows its contempt for her heritage - only to be scolded by an unlikely supporter. Meanwhile, the other Straw Hats start to reassemble to deal with the attack on the Sunny.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Doflamingo recounts for Law the surprising history of the Don Quixote Family, while Nami and the others battle the insane and powerful artist, Giolla! Her ultimate attack renders them incapacitated, and prompts the betrayal of one of their closest allies!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law is pinned by Fujitora, and Doflamingo has the upper hand! Only the most cunning of tricks could save Law's plan to hand Caesar over to Nami & the others! Meanwhile, the Sunny falls into danger again, & the battle for Block D heats up in the Colosseum.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law must put himself in harm's way to defend the Sunny and the Straw Hats from Doflamingo's all-out assault! With barely enough time to save the crew, plans change and send the Sunny on a new mission -- but will it be able to get underway?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Law & Doflamingo are embroiled in a heated showdown which triggers Momonosuke's memories of Doflamingo's cruelty from the first time they met; meanwhile, after a tearful fanboy conversation Zoro finally gets to see Luffy but all eyes are fixed on Rebecca.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Bartolomeo searches the Colosseum for Luffy but stumbles upon the medical center for the losers of the battles in the ring, but is everything at this center as it seems? Meanwhile, Rebecca has to fend off Rolling Logan's vicious bone-crushing grip attack.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The losers of the Colosseum battle who are being held below the infirmary have a surprising person in their midst! But do they have a clue as to their terrifying fate? Meanwhile, the Tontatta Kingdom's history is made clear.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Bartolomeo finally finds Luffy and starts to lead him to Zoro, while the toy soldier begins to tell the heart-breaking story of how Doflamingo cheated the Riku dynasty out of their control of Dressrosa!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the toy soldier's story continues, the sad fate of King Riku and his army, and his daughter Princess Viola, is revealed as well as how the people of Dressrosa fell into the hands of Doflamingo. And all the toys in the country share a mysterious secret.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro, Kin'emon, and Luffy are reunited again, but little do they know that their reunion is being monitored by a potential threat! Meanwhile, the battle rages on between Doflamingo and Law as these two powerhouses clash.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro and Kin'emon make a mad dash to save Law but Navy Admiral Fujitora stands in their way, bringing his full power against them. The Navy is in hot pursuit as a ship approaches with unexpected visitors from the past.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After revealing the horrible history of Dressrosa, Toy Soldier now shares their plan to liberate the Tontatta Kingdom and bring down the Doflamingo Family, Operation SOP. Luffy bumps into a heavily-wounded Bellamy and Bartolomeo

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp and Robin make their way via an underground tunnel dug by the tiny people of the Tontatta Tribe - a tunnel so small in fact, that Franky couldn't fit! Instead, Franky makes his way to the Toy House.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the contenders for the battle of Block D dwindle to only thirty, Rebecca has her hands full with the menacing Suleiman the Beheader! All hope seems lost that she can take him down and move on to the finals!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle for Block D comes to a shocking end and the winner that emerges from the cloud of dust stuns the audience even more! Meanwhile, Luffy, Zoro, Kin'emon, and Wicka of the Tontatta Tribe are about to reach the lift to the palace.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Viola, aka Violet, once a great princess of the Dressrosa family, shows Luffy & the others a secret entrance into the palace which avoids the use of the heavily-guarded lift. In the palace's Suit Chamber, Navy Admiral Fujitora reveals his plans.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The final round at the Corrida Colosseum finally begins, as Diamante joins the combatants in an all-out struggle to win the Flare-Flare Fruit! As the stakes escalate, can one champion beat the others & snatch the fruit from the Colosseum's newest hazard?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and his group continue their ascent towards Doflamingo's inner sanctum, but standing in their way is an executive of the family whose power is so strong moving past him seems impossible! Meanwhile, Cavendish learns the dark secrets of Dressrosa.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As Operation SOP finally gets underway but as Leo makes the dash to hide the Tatabasco grape in Sugar's fruit basket, Robin calls for an emergency stop to the plan! Meanwhile, Luffy, Violet, and Zoro are stalled by Pica whose sheer size overwhelms them.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Operation SOP is underway and nearing its final stage! But Trebol proves a far stronger guard for Sugar than was expected, so Robin hatches a plan to lure him away. But is there enough time to execute the plan before the ruse is discovered?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tontattas are devastated by Trebol's furious attack, but as Usopp tries to convince Leo to abort the operation, Leo tells him about their commander Toy Soldier's stunning true identity! The Toy Soldier finally shakes off Lao G and gets moving again!

programme.desc: As our heroes prepare for Dawn’s entry into the Grand Festival and Ash’s rematch with Volkner, they meet a mysterious girl with a sick Shaymin who needs help!

programme.title: Pokémon the Series

programme.title: Pokémon the Series

programme.title: Pokémon the Series

programme.desc: On their way to Lake Valor and the Grand Festival, our heroes come across a tough Trainer with a pair of incredible Ditto!

programme.title: Pokémon the Series

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash y los chicos deciden visitar un centro de crianza que vieron en un comercial. Sin embargo, el centro encubre un plan diabólico de los miembros del Equipo Rocket, Butch y Cassidy, ¡viejos rivales de Jessie y James!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: ¡Misty y Jessie compiten para ser la Reina del Festival de la Princesa! Ash y Brock le prestan a Misty sus Pokémon para la batalla, y Jessie es derrotada a pesar de su Pokémon sorpresa.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Es Día del Niño, y Ash y sus amigos ayudan a unos niños de una escuela a celebrarlo. El Equipo Rocket arruina la diversión llevándose a un niño en vez de a Pikachu. En un asombroso giro de eventos, Meowth se vuelve bueno… ¿o no?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes viajan a la Isla Cinnabar, donde Ash busca ganar la Medalla Volcán. Un extraño les dice acertijos para llegar al Gimnasio, ¡donde Ash y Pikachu tienen una feroz batalla con un Pokémon que nunca habían visto!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash finalmente localiza el Gimnasio, ¡suspendido sobre una piscina de lava fundida! Sólo un fuerte Pokémon tipo Fuego puede ayudarlo en esta batalla por la Medalla Volcán, así que Ash debe confiar en su malcriado Charizard.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Mientras Ash y los chicos se apresuran a abordar el último transbordador hacia la Isla Cinnabar, son desviados por un grupo de Squirtle, Wartortle y Blastoise que necesitan su ayuda.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: El Horsea de Misty necesita ejercicio desesperadamente, y los chicos deciden llevarlo al Gimnasio de sus hermanas en Ciudad Celeste. Ahí, ella descubre que sus hermanas están planeando un emocionante ballet bajo el agua.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash, Brock y Misty se desvían camino a Ciudad Viridian cuando todas sus pertenencias desaparecen. Mientras buscan sus cosas perdidas, se ven envueltos en un encuentro cercano que de verdad está fuera de este mundo.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes llegan a Ciudad Viridian, donde Ash espera ganar la Medalla Tierra. Llegan al Gimnasio justo a tiempo para ver a su rival, Gary, derrotado por un Pokémon desconocido, ¡y Gary insiste en que es maligno!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: En su camino de vuelta a Pueblo Paleta, nuestros héroes encuentran a un Mr. Mime fugitivo. Ash se disfraza como otro Mr. Mime para poder acercarse. Cuando el Equipo Rocket ataca... ¿atraparán al Mr. Mime correcto?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes encuentran una desviación en el camino y deciden escalar una escarpada y peligrosa montaña. Pikachu se pierde, y todos deben trabajar juntos para encontrarlo, mantener el calor y enfrentar una tormenta.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Al visitar al Profesor Oak, Ash se encuentra con Gary, y hablan de la próxima Liga Pokémon. El Profesor Oak dice que deberían aprender uno del otro en vez de competir, ¡y su trabajo rinde frutos cuando el Equipo Rocket ataca!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Ash se une a su mamá en sus vacaciones en la Isla Espuma. Ahí, busca al programador del Pokédex para aprender de la inusual Evolución de SlowPoké. ¡El misterio es revelado por la incompetencia del Equipo Rocket!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Cuando Ash fracasa al intentar surfear, Victor lo rescata y le cuenta acerca de Humungadunga, una ola gigante que aparece cada 20 años. ¿Podrán Ash y Pikachu darle a Victor la confianza necesaria para montar la ola gigante?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: De vuelta a Pueblo Paleta, Ash y sus amigos conocen a Florinda de la guardería. Su Gloom no evoluciona y cree no estarlo entrenando bien. Cuando el Equipo Rocket ataca, todos ven lo fuerte que puede volverse un Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: ¡Un famoso director llega al pueblo, y todos quieren ser la estrella! Como él sólo quiere Pokémon en su película, Ash, Brock, Misty y el Equipo Rocket luchan para asegurarse que su Pokémon la protagonice junto a Wigglytuff.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Cuando los chicos asisten al estreno de “Pokémon enamorado”, Meowth recuerda su doloroso pasado. Comparte la historia de su vida ante el Equipo Rocket, incluyendo cómo aprendió a caminar y a hablar como humano.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: A sólo tres semanas de iniciar la Liga Pokémon, Ash, Brock y Misty se dirigen al Monte Hideaway a buscar a uno de Élite 4. Buscan consejos de entrenamiento Pokémon, ¡pero descubren una tierra de enormes Onix en su lugar!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Mientras Ash y Brock entrenan para la Liga Pokémon, hallan un templo con fósiles Pokémon. Misty recuerda una ciudad oculta donde la gente construye templos para los Pokémon. ¿Será esta la antigua ciudad de Pokémopolis?

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Camino al torneo de la Liga Pokémon en la Meseta Añil,, los chicos conocen a otro Entrenador. Desafortunadamente, sus Medallas de Gimnasio son robadas, así que no puede competir... ¡a menos que se lleve las medallas de Ash!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: La Liga Pokémon está a punto de empezar, con el encendido ceremonial de la antorcha, que lleva una llama del Pokémon Legendario Moltres. ¡Por supuesto, el Equipo Rocket trata de robarla!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Es el primer día de la Liga Pokémon, y cuando Ash y sus amigos descubren que su primera batalla será en el Campo de Agua, están llenos de consejos.

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja
programme.desc: Cuando Ash conoce a un Entrenador parecido llamado Richie en la Liga Pokémon, los dos chicos pronto se vuelven amigos cercanos, ¡al igual que sus dos Pikachu!

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: Pokémon: aventuras en las Islas Naranja

programme.title: RiffTrax: Vengeance of the Dead
programme.desc: Vengeance of the Dead is the bone-chilling tale of a young man visiting his grandpa, and several other grandpas! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by RiffTrax.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Zombie I Eat Your Skin
programme.desc: A more accurate title would have been I Occasionally Chop Off Heads With a Machete Because I'm The Voodoo Kind Of Zombie, Not The BRAAAAINS Kind. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary from RiffTrax.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Zombie Nightmare
programme.desc: The dead have risen and they're drinking Tim Hortons! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin, and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Blood Theatre
programme.desc: Every time the Blood Theatre opened for business, someone died. But this time, the theater has a good feeling about its chances! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by RiffTrax.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Bloody Pit of Horror
programme.desc: Filmed in PSYCHOVISION, (which we hear Fellini used to shoot in), Bloody Pit of Horror is must see Italian horror at its cheesiest. Mike, Kevin and Bill brave the spider piñata and give it their bloody best.

programme.title: RiffTrax Live: Amityville - The Evil Escapes
programme.desc: There's still evil up there at the old Amityville house. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: Rifftrax Live: House On Haunted Hill
programme.desc: Yes, horror classic House on Haunted Hill provides a mesmerizing walk down “people actually used to find this SCARY?!” lane. This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with live commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill from MST3K.

programme.title: RiffTrax: Hillbillys in a Haunted House
programme.desc: RiffTrax, the guys who make movies funny, bring their comedic riffing treatment to this cheesy 60's non-scary horror classic! This feature is a parody and contains the original movie combined with a comedic commentary by Mike, Kevin and Bill.

programme.desc: A mysterious force puts the crew in a delusional state that causes their most deeply buried thoughts and desires to surface.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Chakotay is stranded on a planet inhabited by natives with ties to his ancestors.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Kes makes contact with Ocampa spacefarers and the female Caretaker, who may have the power to send the crew home.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The theft of a transporter module by Kazon forces thrusts Chakotay into an explosive confrontation with his traitorous former lover Seska.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway must escape from a city under siege by the Mokra, a brutal regime determined to crush the growing resistance movement against it.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: After Torres reactivates a humanoid robot, she's drawn into a war between robotic enemies.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Hoping to strengthen Voyager's strategic position in the quadrant, Janeway reluctantly seeks an alliance with the Kazon.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Paris makes history by becoming the first person to cross the transwarp threshold, but could pay for the achievement with his life.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Unable to come up with a logical motive for a shipboard murder, Tuvok performs a mind-meld with the perpetrator that brings out Tuvok's "killer instinct."

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Torres races against time to stop a deadly self-guided missile on a collision course with disaster.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A rebel Q escapes from incarceration and demands asylum on Voyager so he can commit suicide.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Doctor falls in love with a Vidiian woman stricken by the deadly Phage.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Disregarding orders, Dr. Rush links himself to the Destiny’s computer via the neural interface chair, hoping it will reveal the code needed to control Destiny’s flight path. Learning of this, Col. Young struggles with letting Rush risk his life.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A mysterious mirror transports Dr. Daniel Jackson (Michael Shanks) to another dimension. Suddenly he finds himself on an alternate Earth that is under attack from the Goa'uld. Can he return to his dimension and save the world?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Only Daniel Jackson (Michael Shanks) knows of the Goa'uld plans to invade Earth. But no one takes his warnings seriously - in fact, this time the authorities have chosen to terminate the costly Stargate program and close the gate forever.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: To stop the Goa'uld invasion, the SG-1 team disobeys orders and transports itself to the Goa'uld attack headquarters. Landing amidst preparations for an all-out strike on Earth, the way home is blocked. Can the team avert disaster and save humanity?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When a fleet of Goa'uld warships launches a surprise attack, the SG-1 team uses the Stargate to board an enemy ship with enough explosives to destroy the alien force. But the team's capture suddenly turns their objective into a suicide mission!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: On a daring mission to rescue victims of an interplanetary attack, Carter's body is inhabited by a Goa'uld. And now that Carter has brought the demon back to Earth inside her, the SG-1 team must find a way to destroy it....without destroying Carter!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When the SG-1 team inadvertently helps a desperate criminal, they are charged as accessories to murder and banished to a penal colony. Only one woman there has the power to help them escape....but freedom might not be worth the price she is asking!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Exploring a strange and beautiful garden in a distant world, the team members are trapped, knocked unconscious, and forced to relive their most haunting memories. Now, before they can find their way back home, they must find the way back to reality.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: On a mysterious planet, Jackson (Michael Shanks) saves the life of a beautiful princess, but his heroics cause the SG-1 team to be taken prisoner. Jackson and the princess fall in love, but his romance could spell doom for the entire SG-1 team!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: O'Neill and the SG-1 team travel to the planet of Cimmeria to protect it from a massive Goa'uld attack, but they are quickly outnumbered and overpowered. Can they solve an ancient Cimmerian riddle in time to save the planet…and themselves?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A seemingly harmless orb from a dead world is brought back to the base through the Stargate, but the strange device infects O'Neill (Richard Dean Anderson) with an alien organism. Now, the only chance to save him is to let the organism control him!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 goes on a mission to rescue Teal'c's son, Rya'c, from the grasp of Apophis. But, when they finally reach Rya'c, he doesn't want to be saved -- he's been brainwashed and has accepted Apophis as his god! Can Teal'c find a way to win back his son?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The Stargate project is imperiled when a reporter threatens to expose the top-secret portal. O'Neill attempts to stop him while the rest of the team tries to save Jackson's wife who has been impregnated with a Goa'uld. Is this the end of Stargate?

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: Sheppard and the team discover a world that has technology created by the Ancients. But the planet's royal family does not allow anyone but them to harness the technology and treat the villagers with little dignity.

programme.desc: The ladies from Vegas meet Dave, who promptly takes their locker away; Kenny uses Mary as a shield, and the two find their way to a decent unit of their own.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The blazing heat in Riverside inspires Lisa and Kenny to break out the parasols; Dusty wears his intuition on his sleeve; Ivy releases the hounds and makes out nicely as a result.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The bidders peruse lockers in Mission Viejo, Calif.; Jarrod and Brandi uncover an unusual piece of art; Barry's accountant tries to keep him in check.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy races against time to win a locker and get home; Rene outspends the competition, but Darrell and Brandon manage to come out ahead.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny happens upon a familiar vehicle and follows it all the way to Lancaster for an auction; Rene tries to find new luck, after losing in Vegas; Lisa tries to make up for last time; the Calvins look to a higher power for their profit.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: It's a hot one in Moreno Valley, with temperatures reaching the 100s; Kenny fights the heat by providing everyone with popsicles; Rene brings along his daughter, Tatiana, who needs a math lesson or two; both of Ivy's sons lend a helping hand.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: A locker in Whittier, Calif., features a high payoff; Dave eyes a unit with a stockpile of antiques; Barry's locker may contain old weapons.

programme.desc: The buyers roll into Compton, Calif.; Jarrod gets a new nickname; Mike purchases a locker that Herb doesn't want; Barry is reunited with his old friend Kenny.

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.desc: Rene and Casey return to the auctions; Dave finds a piece of board game history; Jarrod and Brandi try to get a locker; Darrell and Brandon show their moves.

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny feels nostalgic in Koreatown, so he brings along an old friend, which may or may not be a good idea; Brandi and Jarrod sweeten their profit in an unexpected way; Ivy tolerates the big city in an effort to find some name-brand goodies.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: In Riverside, Lisa dons her cowboy garb and brings her money sock along; Rene sinks his teeth into an unassuming unit; Brandi gets to go on a scavenger hunt; Ivy and his boys get a glimpse of retired life; Darrell just isn't feeling like himself.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake’s friendship letter to children worldwide elicits Crepes Suzette's invitation to visit Pearis and the Pieffel Tower.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Friends from all over the world descend on Strawberryland to take part in the first Great Friendship Festival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Out gathering berries one day, Strawberry & her pets find a tiny fairy among the berry vines.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: One windy day, a tiny fairy named Sherry Bobbleberry gets blown into Strawberry’s open window.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Apple Dumplin’ wants to help Strawberry & her Friends with the baking. But Dumplin’s just a little too little to be much help. In fact, she ends up making a pretty big mess of things.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: At the urging of Honey Pie Pony, Strawberry & Friends decide to put on a Cooking Show.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It’s that time of year when the berries are about to burst into bloom – and it looks like this will be a bumper crop!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The Berry Blossom Festival is underway and everyone in Strawberryland is having a Grand Time, thanks to the selfless efforts of Strawberry Shortcake.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and her friends love to dance – and the Peculiar Purple Pieman of Porcupine Peak is taking advantage of that!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It’s winter and the pond’s frozen and that means Strawberry and friends can ice skate!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Strawberry & her friends decide to put on a talent show, they plan to enter themselves as a band called Strawberry Jams

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry and her friends are getting the band back together to perform at a local festival, but Ginger Snap is out of town.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake has always dreamed of seeing a certain rare flower, which only blooms once every ten years – and then only for a day!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: After an accidental wager with Purple Pieman, Strawberry sets off to prove that she can go around the world in 80 days.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: One night, as Strawberry & Friends gaze at the stars, they talk about what they want to be when they grow up.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: As Strawberry & Friends visit a Career Fair, they ponder their own futures. They all have thoughts on the jobs they would like: teacher, firefighter, doctor, etc.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Annie Oatmeal hires both Strawberry Shortcake and Angel Cake to work at her dude ranch.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry gets an unsettling message from her friend Caramel Corn, who owns a quaint little farm out in the Strawberryland countryside.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It’s a retelling of L. Frank Baum’s classic 'Wonderful Wizard of Oz' – told from Pupcake’s point of view.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Strawberry gets an urgent plea to return to Oz, she finds that there’s an environmental disaster in the works.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It’s a retelling of 'Sleeping Beauty' – but our focus is on the fairy that didn’t get her invitation and stubbornly refuses to listen to the reason why.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: This is the story of 'Rapunzel', but with a twist. Princess Rapunzel (Rainbow Sherbet) has always preferred being called Rap and liked doing things her way.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake’s childhood friend, Lime Lite, has hit it big in Berrywood, movie capital of Strawberryland.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Strawberryland’s one movie theatre goes out of business, Strawberry has an idea to save it: she and her friends can film a movie to show there and attract crowds back to the theatre.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake is planning a first birthday party for her sister Apple Dumpling, so she sets off on an adventure to find the perfect party supplies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake travels to magical Holidayland with Honey Pie Pony, searching for the perfect presents to give her friends.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It’s the first day of spring in Strawberryland, at least it’s supposed to be, but with the cold winds blowing and frost on the ground it looks as though spring isn’t going to come this year.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony hurts her leg and must stay in bed instead of heading off for a grand adventure.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Paige has an unresolved trauma since she blames herself for the death of her parents in a car wreck.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Phoebe is serving on a jury in a murder case, and she is convinced that the defendant is guilty. However, when she touches the murder weapon, she has a premonition of the real killer, who has a Medusa tattooed in his right arm.

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Cole proposes again to Phoebe, only now as a normal human, and accepts Paige's proposal to come work for social services, where his zeal to deal with slum lord Alan Yates soon exceeds human boundaries.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: On a road trip with Jim/Sam, Melinda encounters her fair share of trouble.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Melinda discovers a local lake is filled with distressed ghosts because their bodies have been dumped there rather than properly cremated.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: (1/1) Twenty years after a young woman is gruesomely murdered, a similar crime is committed where the victim's heart is removed. (2/2) Chief Bill Gillespie and Chief Detective Virgil Tibbs continue to work together to solve the murder of a young woman.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A respected citizen and prominent businessman of Sparta (Wallace Wilkinson) is mysteriously murdered after a dedication ceremony for a statue he created in the town center...and his family is the prime suspects as a dark family secret is revealed.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: An unexpected visit from Virgil's best friend and former partner in Philadelphia, Matthew Pogue, happens to coincide with the murder of two federal agents and an organized crime witness. Could the two events be connected?

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Chief Bill Gillespie discovers that a longtime friend and sheriff of neighboring Butler County, Ed Thompson, is a racist. In good conscience, he must investigate the deaths of black prisoners as racial tensions boil over between the two counties.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Officer Bubba Skinner is seduced by a beautiful lady who has taken residence in Sparta in order to write a novel. But when her estranged ex-husband shows up, things become much more complicated, and Bubba is faced with a life-changing decision.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Virgil believes he acted in self-defense when he shoots a robbery suspect. But when the teenage girl's gun cannot be found, suspicions arise, even he begins to doubt his own actions. Chief Bill Gillespie does all he can to clear his detective.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Virgil Tibbs’s niece and Bubba Skinner's nephew, teenagers from different worlds, find common ground -- and trouble -- in Sparta. Soon the two are swept up with an ex-con recently paroled from prison, and Gillespie is none too happy about it.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Gillespie (Carroll O'Connor) suspects a newly arrived short-order cook in town may be involved in the recent murder of a young prostitute. Virgil (Howard Rollins) thinks otherwise and is out to prove that a local criminal is to blame.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Virgil and his wife, Althea, are invited to attend services at an all-white church. While attending the service, the reverend collapses, dead at the foot of the pulpit. It seems that not everyone was happy with the pastor's integration plan.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: When Gillespie (Carroll O'Connor) is informed that a death row prisoner wants him present at his execution, the chief struggles over whether capital punishment is cruel and unusual punishment or an appropriate sentence for the crime he committed.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Twelve years ago, Joanne (Lois Nettleton) convinced two friends to testify against their pimp for the murder of a prostitute. Now, three convicts escape from prison, and one of them is out for revenge against the women who sent him to prison.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Tragically, a tiny newborn infant is found dead in the Sparta city dump, and more than just the teenage mother is suspect. Virgil (Howard Rollins) tries to unravel the heartbreaking story of a young teenage girl who was left by her baby's father.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Detective Virgil Tibbs investigates a series of elderly citizens that are being beaten and robbed. Things become more complicated as Detective Tibbs in-laws are visiting from Philadelphia trying to get him and his wife to move back home.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Tibbs and Sweet investigate a woman who has been beaten and left for dead on the banks of a local creek. Tibbs, in particular, takes an interest in this possible wife-beating case and, in the process, unlocks part of his difficult and painful past.
